summary: Posterior palatal seals enhance denture retention by providing a comprehensive sealing effect across the palate; this ensures better stability during use. Key for maintaining optimal oral health and comfort when wearing full or partial dentures. \boxed{} Agent2 reasoned that the primary role of the posterior palatal seal involves enhancing denture retention via an effective seal over the entire palate area, which supports overall dental appliance functionality and user comfort. This summary captures the essential point about improving denture fit while keeping it concise within two sentences as required.
